# Rahul-Choudhary
Personal Website 
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Rahul Choudhary — Thoughts & Vibes</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Playfair+Display:ital,wght@0,400;0,700;1,400&family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600&family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;1,300;1,600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
:root {
  --ink: #0a0908;
  --paper: #f5f0ea;
  --gold: #c9a84c;
  --gold-light: #e8c97a;
  --rust: #9b3a28;
  --muted: #6b6560;
  --card: #141210;
  --line: rgba(201,168,76,0.2);
}
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{background:var(--ink);color:var(--paper);font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;overflow-x:hidden;}

/* grain */
body::before{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;
  background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.85' numOctaves='4'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='0.035'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");
  pointer-events:none;z-index:9999;opacity:.5;}

/* cursor */
.cur{width:7px;height:7px;background:var(--gold);border-radius:50%;position:fixed;pointer-events:none;z-index:10000;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);transition:transform .1s;}
.cur-ring{width:30px;height:30px;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.45);border-radius:50%;position:fixed;pointer-events:none;z-index:10000;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);transition:width .2s,height .2s;}

/* NAV */
nav{position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:200;padding:1.4rem 2.5rem;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,rgba(10,9,8,.97),transparent);}
.nav-logo{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-style:italic;font-size:1.5rem;color:var(--gold);text-decoration:none;letter-spacing:.05em;}
.nav-links{display:flex;gap:2rem;list-style:none;}
.nav-links a{color:rgba(245,240,234,.5);text-decoration:none;font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;transition:color .3s;}
.nav-links a:hover{color:var(--gold);}

/* HERO */
.hero{min-height:100vh;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;align-items:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.hero-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse 70% 80% at 70% 50%,rgba(139,58,42,.08),transparent 65%),radial-gradient(ellipse 40% 50% at 20% 40%,rgba(201,168,76,.05),transparent 60%),#0a0908;}
.hero-left{padding:8rem 3rem 4rem 5rem;position:relative;z-index:2;}
.hero-eyebrow{font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.4em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:2rem;opacity:0;animation:up 1s .3s forwards;}
.hero-name{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(3.5rem,8vw,6.5rem);font-weight:700;line-height:.92;margin-bottom:1.5rem;opacity:0;animation:up 1s .6s forwards;}
.hero-name em{display:block;font-style:italic;font-weight:400;color:var(--gold);font-size:.55em;margin-top:.3rem;}
.hero-sub{font-size:.85rem;color:rgba(245,240,234,.5);line-height:1.9;max-width:380px;margin-bottom:2.5rem;font-weight:300;opacity:0;animation:up 1s .9s forwards;}
.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;opacity:0;animation:up 1s 1.2s forwards;}
.btn{padding:.8rem 2rem;font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;text-decoration:none;transition:all .3s;cursor:pointer;border:none;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;}
.btn-primary{background:var(--gold);color:var(--ink);}
.btn-primary:hover{background:var(--gold-light);transform:translateY(-2px);}
.btn-outline{border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.4);color:rgba(245,240,234,.7);}
.btn-outline:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);}

.hero-right{position:relative;height:100vh;overflow:hidden;}
.hero-right::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to right,var(--ink) 0%,transparent 30%),linear-gradient(to top,var(--ink) 0%,transparent 25%);z-index:1;}
.hero-img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:top center;filter:grayscale(15%) contrast(1.05);}
.hero-tag{position:absolute;bottom:3rem;left:2rem;z-index:2;font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-style:italic;font-size:1rem;color:rgba(245,240,234,.4);}
.scroll-hint{position:absolute;bottom:2.5rem;left:5rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:.5rem;opacity:0;animation:up 1s 2s forwards;z-index:2;}
.scroll-hint span{font-size:.55rem;letter-spacing:.3em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);}
.scroll-line{width:1px;height:45px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--gold),transparent);animation:pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;}

/* PHOTO STRIP */
.strip{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0;height:420px;overflow:hidden;}
.strip-item{position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.strip-item img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:top;transition:transform .6s ease;filter:grayscale(20%);}
.strip-item:hover img{transform:scale(1.05);filter:grayscale(0%);}
.strip-item::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(10,9,8,.7),transparent 50%);}
.strip-label{position:absolute;bottom:1.2rem;left:1.2rem;z-index:2;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);}

/* ABOUT */
.about{padding:7rem 5rem;display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:5rem;align-items:center;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;}
.about-img-wrap{position:relative;}
.about-img-wrap::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:-12px;border:1px solid var(--gold);opacity:.25;pointer-events:none;}
.about-img-wrap::after{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:-18px;right:-18px;width:80px;height:80px;border-right:2px solid var(--gold);border-bottom:2px solid var(--gold);opacity:.35;}
.about-img{width:100%;aspect-ratio:3/4;object-fit:cover;object-position:top;display:block;filter:grayscale(10%);}
.about-text .eyebrow{font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.4em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:1rem;}
.about-text h2{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3rem);font-weight:400;line-height:1.2;margin-bottom:1.5rem;}
.divider{width:50px;height:1px;background:var(--gold);margin:1.5rem 0 2rem;}
.about-text p{color:rgba(245,240,234,.6);line-height:1.95;font-size:.9rem;margin-bottom:1rem;font-weight:300;}
.highlight-quote{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-style:italic;font-size:1.25rem;color:var(--gold);border-left:2px solid var(--gold);padding-left:1.2rem;margin:2rem 0;line-height:1.7;}

/* OSHO BAND */
.osho-band{background:#0d0a08;border-top:1px solid var(--line);border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);padding:4.5rem 2rem;text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.osho-band::before{content:'OSHO';position:absolute;font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:18rem;color:rgba(201,168,76,.03);top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);white-space:nowrap;pointer-events:none;}
.osho-q{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-style:italic;font-size:clamp(1.1rem,2.5vw,1.8rem);color:var(--gold-light);max-width:750px;margin:0 auto 1.2rem;line-height:1.65;position:relative;}
.osho-attr{font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.35em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--muted);}

/* QUOTES */
.quotes-section{background:#080604;padding:6rem 2rem;}
.quotes-inner{max-width:1150px;margin:0 auto;}
.sec-label{font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:.4em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:.8rem;}
.sec-title{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,4vw,3rem);font-weight:400;line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:.5rem;}
.grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(310px,1fr));gap:1.2rem;margin-top:2.5rem;}

/* QUOTE CARD */
.qcard{background:var(--card);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.1);padding:2.2rem;position:relative;transition:border-color .3s,transform .3s;}
.qcard:hover{border-color:rgba(201,168,76,.35);transform:translateY(-4px);}
.qcard::before{content:'\201C';position:absolute;top:.8rem;left:1.2rem;font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:3.5rem;color:var(--gold);opacity:.12;line-height:1;}
.qtext{font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.85;color:rgba(245,240,234,.85);margin-bottom:1.5rem;position:relative;z-index:1;}
.qfoot{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;}
.qauthor{font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.15em;color:var(--gold);text-transform:uppercase;}
.like-btn{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;background:none;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.2);color:rgba(245,240,234,.45);padding:.35rem .85rem;cursor:pointer;font-size:.72rem;transition:all .3s;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;}
.like-btn:hover,.like-btn.liked{border-color:var(--rust);color:#d9605a;}
.like-btn .h{transition:transform .2s;}
.like-btn:hover .h,.like-btn.liked .h{transform:scale(1.35);color:#d9605a;}

/* NEW QUOTE BADGE */
.new-badge{font-size:.55rem;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--rust);margin-bottom:.4rem;}
.visitor-card{border-left:2px solid var(--rust);}

/* LIVE NOTICE */
.live-notice{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.6rem;background:rgba(155,58,40,.12);border:1px solid rgba(155,58,40,.25);padding:.6rem 1.2rem;margin-top:1.5rem;width:fit-content;}
.live-dot{width:7px;height:7px;background:#d9605a;border-radius:50%;animation:blink 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;}
.live-notice span{font-size:.65rem;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:rgba(245,240,234,.6);}
@keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:.2;}}

/* SUBMIT */
.submit-section{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#0e0b09,#0a0908);padding:6rem 2rem;text-align:center;}
.submit-inner{max-width:620px;margin:0 auto;}
.submit-inner h2{font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;font-size:clamp(1.8rem,4vw,2.6rem);font-weight:400;margin-bottom:.8rem;}
.submit-inner p{color:rgba(245,240,234,.45);font-size:.85rem;line-height:1.85;margin-bottom:2.8rem;font-weight:300;}
.qform{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:.9rem;}
.qform input,.qform textarea{width:100%;background:rgba(245,240,234,.04);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.18);color:var(--paper);padding:.95rem 1.2rem;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:.88rem;outline:none;transition:border-color .3s;resize:none;}
.qform input:focus,.qform textarea:focus{border-color:var(--gold);}
.qform input::placeholder,.qform textarea::placeholder{color:rgba(245,240,234,.22);}
.submit-btn{padding:.95rem 3rem;background:var(--gold);color:var(--ink);border:none;font-family:'Inter',sans-serif;font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;cursor:pointer;transition:all .3s;align-self:center;font-weight:600;}
.submit-btn:hover{background:var(--gold-light);transform:translateY(-2px);}
.char-count{font-size:.65rem;color:var(--muted);text-align:right;margin-top:-.4rem;}

/* SOCIAL */
.social-section{padding:5rem 2rem;max-width:1150px;margin:0 auto;text-align:center;}
.social-grid{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:1.5rem;margin-top:2.5rem;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.social-card{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:.9rem;padding:2.2rem 3rem;border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.13);text-decoration:none;color:var(--paper);transition:all .4s;position:relative;overflow:hidden;min-width:170px;}
.social-card::before{content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:2px;background:var(--gold);transform:scaleX(0);transition:transform .4s;}
.social-card:hover{border-color:rgba(201,168,76,.38);background:rgba(201,168,76,.04);}
.social-card:hover::before{transform:scaleX(1);}
.s-icon{font-size:2rem;}
.s-name{font-size:.62rem;letter-spacing:.25em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);}
.s-handle{font-size:.78rem;color:rgba(245,240,234,.45);}

/* FOOTER */
footer{padding:2.5rem 3rem;border-top:1px solid var(--line);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;max-width:1200px;margin:0 auto;}
.f-name{font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;font-style:italic;font-size:1.2rem;color:var(--gold);}
.f-copy{font-size:.6rem;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.1em;}

/* TOAST */
.toast{position:fixed;bottom:2rem;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(100px);background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--gold);color:var(--paper);padding:.9rem 2rem;font-size:.82rem;z-index:1000;transition:transform .4s ease;pointer-events:none;white-space:nowrap;}
.toast.show{transform:translateX(-50%) translateY(0);}

/* REVEAL */
.reveal{opacity:0;transform:translateY(28px);transition:opacity .8s ease,transform .8s ease;}
.reveal.visible{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}

/* ANIMS */
@keyframes up{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(18px);}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0);}}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.3;}50%{opacity:1;}}

/* MOBILE */
@media(max-width:900px){
  .hero{grid-template-columns:1fr;min-height:auto;}
  .hero-left{padding:7rem 2rem 2rem;}
  .hero-right{height:60vw;}
  .about{grid-template-columns:1fr;padding:4rem 2rem;gap:3rem;}
  .strip{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .strip{height:auto;}
  .strip-item{height:260px;}
  .nav-links{display:none;}
  footer{flex-direction:column;gap:.8rem;text-align:center;}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="cur" id="cur"></div>
<div class="cur-ring" id="curRing"></div>
<div class="toast" id="toast">✨ Your thought is live on the wall!</div>

<!-- NAV -->
<nav>
  <a class="nav-logo" href="#">RC</a>
  <ul class="nav-links">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#thoughts">Thoughts</a></li>
    <li><a href="#share">Share</a></li>
    <li><a href="#connect">Connect</a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- HERO -->
<div class="hero">
  <div class="hero-bg"></div>
  <div class="hero-left">
    <p class="hero-eyebrow">Thoughts · Vibes · Words</p>
    <h1 class="hero-name">Rahul<em>Choudhary</em></h1>
    <p class="hero-sub">A student, a reader, a wanderer of words. Deeply inspired by Osho — believing that the most profound truths live between the lines.</p>
    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="#thoughts" class="btn btn-primary">Read Thoughts</a>
      <a href="#share" class="btn btn-outline">Share Yours</a>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="hero-right">
    <img class="hero-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Rahul Choudhary">
    <span class="hero-tag">Rahul Choudhary, 2024</span>
  </div>
  <div class="scroll-hint">
    <span>scroll</span>
    <div class="scroll-line"></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PHOTO STRIP -->
<div class="strip reveal">
  <div class="strip-item">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Rahul">
    <span class="strip-label">Mirror. Mind.</span>
  </div>
  <div class="strip-item">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Rahul">
    <span class="strip-label">Still. Aware.</span>
  </div>
  <div class="strip-item">
    <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Rahul">
    <span class="strip-label">Light. Shadow.</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ABOUT -->
<section id="about">
<div class="about">
  <div class="about-img-wrap reveal">
    <img class="about-img" src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Rahul Choudhary">
  </div>
  <div class="about-text reveal">
    <p class="eyebrow">Who I Am</p>
    <h2>An ordinary soul<br>with <em style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:var(--gold);">extraordinary thoughts</em></h2>
    <div class="divider"></div>
    <p>I'm Rahul Choudhary — a student from Jodhpur, Rajasthan. I live inside books, and Osho's words feel like home to my restless mind.</p>
    <div class="highlight-quote">"फ़िलहाल ग़ायब हैं मेरे पंख — हर चीज़ का भार इस बात पर निर्भर करता है कि उसे किसने रखा है।"</div>
    <p>This space is where my thoughts breathe. Sometimes Hindi, sometimes silence — but always honest.</p>
  </div>
</div>
</section>

<!-- OSHO BAND -->
<div class="osho-band reveal">
  <p class="osho-q">"जब तक तुम खुद को नहीं जानते, तब तक तुम कुछ भी नहीं जानते।"</p>
  <p class="osho-attr">— Osho · My Inspiration</p>
</div>

<!-- QUOTES -->
<div class="quotes-section" id="thoughts">
  <div class="quotes-inner">
    <p class="sec-label reveal">Thoughts & Words</p>
    <h2 class="sec-title reveal">My Quotes Wall</h2>
    <div class="live-notice reveal">
      <div class="live-dot"></div>
      <span>Live · Anyone can add their thought below</span>
    </div>
    <div class="grid" id="quotesGrid">

      <div class="qcard reveal">
        <div class="qtext">फ़िलहाल ग़ायब हैं मेरे पंख — हर चीज़ जो हमारे दिल पर रखी होती है, उसका भार इस बात पर निर्भर करता है कि इसे किसने रखा है।</div>
        <div class="qfoot">
          <span class="qauthor">— Rahul</span>
          <button class="like-btn" onclick="likeQ(this)"><span class="h">♥</span><span class="cnt">0</span></button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="qcard reveal">
        <div class="qtext">मैं उसकी सबसे श्रेष्ठ रचना हूं — ऐब तो तुम ढूंढते हो।</div>
        <div class="qfoot">
          <span class="qauthor">— Rahul</span>
          <button class="like-btn" onclick="likeQ(this)"><span class="h">♥</span><span class="cnt">0</span></button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="qcard reveal">
        <div class="qtext">कभी-कभी मैं सोचता हूं कि दुनिया कितनी ख़राब है — यह सोचते हुए सहसा मेरी नज़र कमरे के एक कोने पर लगे शीशे पर चली जाती है। उसके बाद मैं लाख कोशिशों के बाद भी वह नहीं कह पाता जो मैंने अभी-अभी कहा।</div>
        <div class="qfoot">
          <span class="qauthor">— Rahul</span>
          <button class="like-btn" onclick="likeQ(this)"><span class="h">♥</span><span class="cnt">0</span></button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="qcard reveal">
        <div class="qtext">हम सभी अपनी परछाईं ढोने के लिए अभिशप्त हैं। सूरज ढलने के बाद परछाईं फैलकर रात हो जाती है। तारे हमारे छूटे हुए सपने हैं।</div>
        <div class="qfoot">
          <span class="qauthor">— Favourite</span>
          <button class="like-btn" onclick="likeQ(this)"><span class="h">♥</span><span class="cnt">0</span></button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="qcard reveal">
        <div class="qtext">चिलचिलाती धूप में सावन कहां से आ गया, आपकी आंखों में अपनापन कहां से आ गया।</div>
        <div class="qfoot">
          <span class="qauthor">— Favourite Sher</span>
          <button class="like-btn" onclick="likeQ(this)"><span class="h">♥</span><span class="cnt">0</span></button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="qcard reveal">
        <div class="qtext">मैं कभी गुज़रा नहीं दुनिया तेरे बाज़ार से, मेरे बच्चों के लिए राशन कहां से आ गया।</div>
        <div class="qfoot">
          <span class="qauthor">— Favourite Sher</span>
          <button class="like-btn" onclick="likeQ(this)"><span class="h">♥</span><span class="cnt">0</span></button>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- SUBMIT -->
<div class="submit-section" id="share">
  <div class="submit-inner">
    <p class="sec-label reveal">Your Turn</p>
    <h2 class="reveal">Share your thought — <em style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:var(--gold);">it goes live instantly</em></h2>
    <p class="reveal">No sign-up needed. Just write and it appears on the wall above for everyone to see.</p>
    <div class="qform reveal">
      <input type="text" id="vName" placeholder="Your name (or stay Anonymous)">
      <textarea id="vQuote" rows="5" placeholder="Write your thought here... Hindi or English, both welcome." oninput="updateChar()"></textarea>
      <div class="char-count"><span id="charCnt">0</span> / 300</div>
      <button class="submit-btn" onclick="submitQ()">Post to Wall →</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- SOCIAL -->
<div class="social-section" id="connect">
  <p class="sec-label reveal">Connect</p>
  <h2 class="sec-title reveal">Find me <em style="font-family:'Playfair Display',serif;color:var(--gold);">here</em></h2>
  <div class="social-grid reveal">
    <a href="https://www.instagram.com/rahul_choudhary__021?igsh=MTQwdzc3MG84NWpzZA%3D%3D&utm_source=qr" target="_blank" class="social-card">
      <div class="s-icon">📸</div>
      <div class="s-name">Instagram</div>
      <div class="s-handle">@rahul_choudhary__021</div>
    </a>
    <a href="https://snapchat.com/t/PufyGGtv" target="_blank" class="social-card">
      <div class="s-icon">👻</div>
      <div class="s-name">Snapchat</div>
      <div class="s-handle">Add on Snap</div>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FOOTER -->
<footer>
  <div class="f-name">Rahul Choudhary</div>
  <div class="f-copy">© 2024 · All thoughts reserved</div>
</footer>

<script>
// Cursor
const cur = document.getElementById('cur');
const ring = document.getElementById('curRing');
let mx=0,my=0,rx=0,ry=0;
document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{mx=e.clientX;my=e.clientY;cur.style.left=mx+'px';cur.style.top=my+'px';});
(function ani(){rx+=(mx-rx)*.13;ry+=(my-ry)*.13;ring.style.left=rx+'px';ring.style.top=ry+'px';requestAnimationFrame(ani);})();

// Like
function likeQ(btn){
  btn.classList.toggle('liked');
  const c=btn.querySelector('.cnt');
  const h=btn.querySelector('.h');
  let n=parseInt(c.textContent);
  c.textContent=btn.classList.contains('liked')?n+1:n-1;
  h.style.transform='scale(1.6)';
  setTimeout(()=>h.style.transform='',280);
}

// Char count
function updateChar(){
  const v=document.getElementById('vQuote').value;
  document.getElementById('charCnt').textContent=v.length;
}

// Submit
function submitQ(){
  const name=document.getElementById('vName').value.trim()||'Anonymous';
  const quote=document.getElementById('vQuote').value.trim();
  if(!quote){document.getElementById('vQuote').focus();return;}
  if(quote.length>300){alert('Please keep it under 300 characters.');return;}

  const grid=document.getElementById('quotesGrid');
  const card=document.createElement('div');
  card.className='qcard visitor-card';
  card.style.opacity='0';
  card.style.transform='translateY(20px)';
  card.innerHTML=`
    <div class="new-badge">✦ Just Added</div>
    <div class="qtext">${esc(quote)}</div>
    <div class="qfoot">
      <span class="qauthor">— ${esc(name)}</span>
      <button class="like-btn" onclick="likeQ(this)"><span class="h">♥</span><span class="cnt">0</span></button>
    </div>
  `;
  grid.prepend(card);
  setTimeout(()=>{card.style.transition='all .6s ease';card.style.opacity='1';card.style.transform='translateY(0)';},40);

  document.getElementById('vName').value='';
  document.getElementById('vQuote').value='';
  document.getElementById('charCnt').textContent='0';

  const t=document.getElementById('toast');
  t.classList.add('show');
  setTimeout(()=>t.classList.remove('show'),3200);

  setTimeout(()=>document.querySelector('.quotes-section').scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth'}),400);
}

function esc(s){return s.replace(/&/g,'&amp;').replace(/</g,'&lt;').replace(/>/g,'&gt;');}

// Reveal on scroll
const obs=new IntersectionObserver(es=>es.forEach(e=>{if(e.isIntersecting){e.target.classList.add('visible');obs.unobserve(e.target);}}),{threshold:.1});
document.querySelectorAll('.reveal').forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));
</script>
</body>
</html>
